#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Local Go installer (no sudo) and build runner.
# It will:
# - skip install if 'go' already exists
# - otherwise download the specified Go tarball into $HOME/.local/go
# - update PATH for this session and run: go build ./...
# Notes: requires either curl or wget, and tar.

GO_VERSION="${GO_VERSION:-1.21.6}"   # adjust if you want a different version
DEST="${HOME}/.local/go"
TMPDIR="${HOME}/.cache/go-install"
mkdir -p "$TMPDIR"

# helper download function
download() {
  url="$1"
  out="$2"
  if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    curl -fSL --retry 3 -o "$out" "$url"
  elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    wget -qO "$out" "$url"
  else
    echo "ERROR: neither curl nor wget is installed. Install one or download Go manually from https://go.dev/dl/" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Go already installed: $(go version)"
  echo "Running: go build ./..."
  go build ./...
  exit 0
fi

# detect OS and ARCH for Go tarball naming
unames=$(uname -s)
case "$unames" in
  Linux) OS="linux" ;;
  Darwin) OS="darwin" ;;
  *) echo "Unsupported OS: $unames. Install Go manually from https://go.dev/dl/." >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac

ua=$(uname -m)
case "$ua" in
  x86_64|amd64) ARCH="amd64" ;;
  aarch64|arm64) ARCH="arm64" ;;
  armv7l) ARCH="armv6l" ;; # best-effort; some arm builds vary
  *) echo "Unsupported architecture: $ua. Install Go manually from https://go.dev/dl/." >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac

TARBALL="go${GO_VERSION}.${OS}-${ARCH}.tar.gz"
URL="https://go.dev/dl/${TARBALL}"
OUT="${TMPDIR}/${TARBALL}"

echo "Downloading $URL ..."
download "$URL" "$OUT"

# remove any previous local install (only in $DEST) to avoid conflicts
if [ -d "$DEST" ]; then
  echo "Removing previous local Go at $DEST"
  rm -rf "${DEST}"
fi

echo "Extracting to $DEST ..."
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DEST")"
tar -C "$(dirname "$DEST")" -xzf "$OUT"

# The official tarball extracts to ./go, move it to $DEST if needed
if [ -d "${TMPDIR}/go" ] && [ ! -d "$DEST" ]; then
  mv "${TMPDIR}/go" "$DEST"
fi

# Ensure bin is in PATH for this session
export PATH="${DEST}/bin:${PATH}"

if ! command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "ERROR: go binary not found after extraction. Something went wrong." >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "Installed Go: $(go version)"
echo "You may want to add the following to your shell profile to make this persistent:"
echo "  export PATH=\"${DEST}/bin:\$PATH\""
echo
echo "Running: go build ./..."
go build ./...

echo "Build finished. If there are no errors, compilation succeeded."
```

#    with code that populates the map from the slice.
# Handles variants like:

#   fieldsRequiredForFaceting = facetsBuilder.RequiredFields()
#   fieldsRequiredForFaceting := facetsBuilder.RequiredFields()
# Keep indentation.
perl -0777 -pe '
  s{^([ \t]*)            # capture indentation
    (?:var[ \t]+)?       # optional var
    fieldsRequiredForFaceting   # the var name
    [ \t]*[:=]{1,2}[ \t]*       # := or = or :=
    facetsBuilder\.RequiredFields\(\)[ \t]*\n  # call
